sections.heading: These Regulations may be cited as the Companies (Fees) Title
sections.text:
1. These Regulations may be cited as the Companies (Fees) Title
Regulations, 2019.

sections.heading: The fees set out in the Schedule are payable in respect of Fees
sections.text:

the matters specified therein.

sections.heading: The Companies (Fees) Regulations, 1995, are revoked. Revocation
sections.text:

PRESCRlBED FEES
(A) Companies limited by shares, limited by guarantee and unlimited Companies
I. Registration ofa company limited by shares and unlimited companies, 2.5% of the nominal
capital shall be paid as incorporation fees, except that the total fee for registration (incorporation)
fees shall not exceed 8,333,333.33 fee units, but in no case shall the nominal capital be less than-
Fee Units
(a) Private Company 50,000
(b) Public Company 5,000,000
(c) Bureau de-Change 250,000
(d) Financial Institution 2,500,000
(e) For a Local Bank 520,000,000
(I) For a Foreign Bank 2,600,000,000

sections.heading: The Registration fee for incorporation of a company filed
sections.text:
3. The Registration fee for incorporation of a company filed
onl ine shall be 250 unit less the prescribed fee under
paragraphs 1 and 2

sections.heading: Registration fee for increase in capital after the first registration
sections.text:
4. Registration fee for increase in capital after the first registration
of a company shall be 2.5% of the value of the increase in share
capital except that the total fee for increase in capital shall
not exceed 8,333,333.33 fee units and in no case shall the
nominal capital be less than the minimum nominal capital
prescribed under paragraph I
